nasb.text: and when I had fixed my gaze on it and was observing it I saw the four-footed animals of the earth and the wild beasts and the crawling creatures and the birds of the air.

esv.text: Looking at it closely, I observed animals and beasts of prey and reptiles and birds of the air.

cnv.text: 我定睛觀察，看見裡面有地上的四足牲畜、走獸，還有昆蟲和天空的飛鳥。

ccb.text: 我定睛一看，里面有牲畜、野兽、爬虫和飞禽。

csbs.text: 我注目观看它，看见里面有地上的四足动物、野兽、爬行动物和天空的飞鸟；
